action: Compose raw WebDriver BiDi wire normalization and semantic browser verification into a staged fail-closed evidence pipeline.

progress.finding: Transport validity and semantic claim validity are different evidence stages and must retain separate rejection reasons.
progress.handoff: Vercel and Cloudflare browser adapters should pass retained raw server-to-client frames directly to verifyBidiEvidenceFrames and persist stage, reason, frame count, schemas, and limits. A semantic rejection after valid wire normalization must not be reported as a transport failure.

limits: no live browser WebSocket transcript captured
acceptance is not cryptographic provenance, browser conformance, physical output proof, or user-perception proof
